idea-plugin.name: CodeAgent
idea-plugin.description:
CodeAgent
IDE-native AI coding agent for JetBrains

Build with context. Review with control.

CodeAgent brings a focused AI workspace into IntelliJ IDEA and other JetBrains IDEs. It understands your project, streams the work as it happens, and keeps every meaningful change visible and reviewable.

ContextEngine
Local project indexing, symbol-aware retrieval, and automatic incremental synchronization. 		Agent workflow
Streaming model turns, tool passes, subagents, tasks, and durable jobs in one timeline.
IDE capabilities
Read, edit, search, terminal, Git, editor navigation, image attachments, and Mermaid diagrams. 		Review and safety
Approval-controlled mutations, verification gates, native Diff review, and auditable history.

Designed for real projects

  • Local-first repository context with watcher-based incremental indexing.
  • Model context budgeting with automatic compaction before the configured limit.
  • Lazy tool discovery so each run starts focused and expands only when needed.
  • Backend model and tool health checks surfaced directly in Settings.

CodeAgent keeps the IDE in the loop while AI does the work.
